title: Bayangan di Seberang Jembatan
theme: Mengamati detail-detail kecil di sekitar kita dapat mengungkap cerita tersembunyi yang awalnya tampak tak signifikan, memicu refleksi diri tentang kebiasaan dan asumsi kita sehari-hari.

cover.prompt: A serene late afternoon view over the Ciliwung River. The sky is a gentle blend of soft orange, muted purple, and grayish-blue, reminiscent of a fading watercolor artwork. Golden hour light bathes the scene. Subtle ripples on the water reflect the tranquil sky. In the midground, a lone silhouette, possibly a figure holding a camera, stands on a riverside pathway, observing the peaceful panorama. Distant buildings form gentle silhouettes against the colorful horizon. The composition evokes a sense of calm contemplation and subtle intrigue.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting.

meta.plan_summary: A freelance photographer becomes obsessed with a woman's consistent, enigmatic routine across a bridge, documenting her daily actions. Through detailed observation, he uncovers the simple, personal meaning behind her ritual, leading to self-reflection about his own tendency to seek grand narratives and finding peace in accepting life's simple moments.
meta.target_emotion: introspeksi, kedamaian, refleksi, kekaguman akan kesederhanaan
